description.value: Kathuria Rollmill Private Limited, based in Vijay Nagar, Uttar Pradesh, is a prominent industrial equipment supplier and manufacturing firm. They specialize in providing comprehensive steel rolling mill solutions, leveraging technology and innovation to deliver high-quality products and services, including specialized equipment like Grip Tilters. The company is dedicated to optimizing manufacturing processes for clients across India and globally.

catalog_items.raw_name: Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'
catalog_items.clean_name: Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'
catalog_items.description: This High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll is engineered for an impressive speed of 35 meters per second. It features a compact and rigid design with a shock-absorbing arrangement to effectively counter vibrations, ensuring durability and ease of use. It also includes an axial adjustment arrangement for roll assembly alignment and a highly engineered bearing arrangement.
catalog_items.seo_title: Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'
catalog_items.alt_text: Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'

specifications.Alignment: Axial adjustment arrangement to hold & keep the Roll Assembly aligned & stable

social_source.caption:
Introducing Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'

Engineered to achieve an impressive speed of 35 meters per second, this Pinch Roll boasts a compact and rigid design, complete with a shock-absorbing arrangement to effectively counter vibrations. 

Discover the perfect blend of speed, durability, and ease of use with Kathuria's latest innovation.

#Kathuria #SteelMills #PinchRoll #Engineering #Innovation #HighPerformance

catalog_items.description: A 'kathuria' Hydraulic Billet Shear used for cutting cold billets of various sizes and lengths. This robust industrial machine is available in multiple capacities and is designed to cut billets up to 160 mm in size.

social_source.caption:
'kathuria' Hydraulic Billet Shear used for cutting of Cold Billets for various sizes and lengths.

The machine is available with the capacity of 800 Ton, 1000 Ton & 1200 Ton. The machine has been designed to cut the Billets size up to 160 mm.

catalog_items.raw_name: Complete Hot Steel Rolling Mill Solution
catalog_items.clean_name: Complete Hot Steel Rolling Mill Solution
catalog_items.description: This post showcases the execution of a Kathuria engineering project through a detailed time-lapse video, highlighting their expertise in delivering reliable, high-performance solutions for the steel rolling mill industry. Kathuria specializes in complete solutions for hot steel rolling mills, covering design, equipment supply, and installation.
catalog_items.seo_title: Complete Hot Steel Rolling Mill Solution
catalog_items.alt_text: Complete Hot Steel Rolling Mill Solution

specifications.Project Scope: Groundwork, structural assembly, precision installation, design, equipment supply, installation
specifications.Industry Focus: Steel rolling mill industry, hot steel rolling mills
specifications.Expertise: Decades of experience in engineering, manufacturing, and project execution

social_source.caption:
Experience the execution of a Kathuria engineering project through this detailed time-lapse video. From groundwork and structural assembly to precision installation, this project reflects Kathuria’s expertise in delivering reliable, high-performance solutions for the steel rolling mill industry.

With decades of experience in engineering, manufacturing, and project execution, Kathuria specializes in complete solutions for hot steel rolling mills—covering design, equipment supply, installation, and after-sales support. This time-lapse highlights the discipline, planning, and technical excellence that go into every Kathuria project.

If you are planning a new steel rolling mill or upgrading an existing setup, Kathuria offers proven engineering solutions built for performance, durability, and long-term value.

Visit us at https://www.kathuriarollmill.com/

catalog_items.alt_text: Grip Tilter from Kathuria Rollmill Private Limited

posts.caption:
At #Kathuria Rollmill (kathuriarollmill.com), we are working everyday to offer progressive - forward thinking - solutions in the #Steel Rolling Mill domain. 100+ clients across the globe trust our unwavering commitment to #quality. Become a part of the Kathuria family today! 
.
.
.
If you have a question - please feel free to drop a comment. Or if you would like to get in touch with us, please contact us at info@kathuriarollmill.com or +91 120 4179800/+91 7428982666.

#Kathuria #rollingmill #TMTrebars #wirerod #merchantmills #steelindustry #hotrolling #MakeinIndia #steelmanufacturing

#Kathuria Rollmill is pleased to announce the successful and swift #commissioning of 300,000 TPA #TMT bar mill at Rungta Mines Ltd., Chaliyama Steel Plant II. 
.
.
.
If you have a question - please feel free to drop a comment. Or if you would like to get in touch with us, please contact us at info@kathuriarollmill.com or +91 120 4179800/+91 7428982666.

At Kathuria Rollmill (https://kathuriarollmill.com), we are working everyday to offer progressive - forward thinking - solutions. 100+ clients across the globe trust our commitment to quality. Become a part of the Kathuria family today! 

#Kathuria #rollingmill #TMTrebars #Steel #hotrolling #MakeinIndia
Kathuria sends wishes on World Social Media Day and honours the role of Social Media in uniting the Digital World from networking to knowledge sharing. #socialmedialife #socialmediaday

Introducing Kathuria 'High Speed Tail Braker Pinch Roll'

Engineered to achieve an impressive speed of 35 meters per second, this Pinch Roll boasts a compact and rigid design, complete with a shock-absorbing arrangement to effectively counter vibrations. 

Discover the perfect blend of speed, durability, and ease of use with Kathuria's latest innovation.

#Kathuria #SteelMills #PinchRoll #Engineering #Innovation #HighPerformance

Kathuria celebrates wellness for self through yoga to strengthen the mind, body, soul and society and wishes a very happy #InternationalYogaDay to everyone. 
#yogainspiration #yogalife #yogapractice

Kathuria proudly participated as a Sponsor at AIIFA 2025, reaffirming its long-standing commitment to the growth and advancement of India’s steel industry. The event brought together key stakeholders, industry leaders, and technology providers to exchange insights on innovation, sustainability, and the future of steel manufacturing.

Through its presence at AIIFA 2025, Kathuria showcased its engineering capabilities and comprehensive solutions for the steel rolling mill sector—backed by decades of experience in design, manufacturing, project execution, and after-sales support.

Our participation as a sponsor reflects Kathuria’s continued dedication to supporting industry platforms that drive collaboration, knowledge sharing, and technological progress within the steel ecosystem.
Successful Installation and Running of 'kathuria' Complete Automatic Rack Type Cooling Bed (78 meters x 7 meters) at one of our customer's site in Maharashtra, India

'kathuria' Hydraulic Billet Shear used for cutting of Cold Billets for various sizes and lengths.

The machine is available with the capacity of 800 Ton, 1000 Ton & 1200 Ton. The machine has been designed to cut the Billets size up to 160 mm.

Experience the execution of a Kathuria engineering project through this detailed time-lapse video. From groundwork and structural assembly to precision installation, this project reflects Kathuria’s expertise in delivering reliable, high-performance solutions for the steel rolling mill industry.

With decades of experience in engineering, manufacturing, and project execution, Kathuria specializes in complete solutions for hot steel rolling mills—covering design, equipment supply, installation, and after-sales support. This time-lapse highlights the discipline, planning, and technical excellence that go into every Kathuria project.

If you are planning a new steel rolling mill or upgrading an existing setup, Kathuria offers proven engineering solutions built for performance, durability, and long-term value.

Visit us at https://www.kathuriarollmill.com/
Successful Installation and Running of 'kathuria' Housingless Mill Stands along with Gear Boxes & auxiliaries in 'Electrotherm'

plan_execution.reasoning: The seller record contains a good number of raw products (25), a complete company profile, and a reviews API URL.
